node.statement: SECOND piece of (5.2): ||P(h o h_{t,u})|| <= C sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u||, where h=h_{r,s}, t,u in A. By the sign identity (node 1.1, def-square-hole) h=h_{r,s}=-q_{r,s} and likewise h_{t,u}=-q_{t,u}, so h o h_{t,u}=(-q_{r,s}) o (-q_{t,u})=q_{r,s} o q_{t,u}, hence P(h o h_{t,u})=P(q_{r,s} o q_{t,u}) and ||P(h o h_{t,u})||=||P(q_{r,s} o q_{t,u})||. Apply GT-HH (two-hole insertion): ||P(q_{r,s} o q_{t,u})|| <= C eta||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u||. Finally eta = sqrt(eta) * sqrt(eta) <= sqrt(eta) because sqrt(eta) <= sqrt(eta_0) < sqrt(1/4) = 1/2 < 1; so C eta||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u|| <= C sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u||. This O(eta) term is absorbed into the O(sqrt eta) target.
